description: Voice-call fraud where criminals impersonate banks, telecom providers, government officials, delivery services, customer support or payment platforms to obtain OTPs, credentials, remote access or money.
recommended_actions: Disconnect suspicious calls and do not call back numbers shared by the caller.
Never share OTPs, UPI PINs, passwords, CVV, card details or screen-sharing codes.
Verify claims only through official customer care numbers, bank branches or official apps.
Report financial fraud immediately by calling 1930.
Preserve call logs, phone numbers, recordings, screenshots and transaction details.

rules.name: OTP or PIN Requested on Call
rules.explanation: The caller asks for an OTP, PIN or verification code, which legitimate institutions do not request.
examples: Read the OTP to complete bank verification.
Tell me your UPI PIN to receive refund.

rules.name: Bank Customer Care Impersonation
rules.explanation: The caller impersonates bank staff to obtain credentials or force urgent verification.
examples: I am calling from your bank's fraud department.
Your debit card is blocked. Verify details now.

rules.name: Remote Access App Request
rules.explanation: The caller asks the victim to install a remote access or screen-sharing app, enabling device takeover.
examples: Install AnyDesk so I can fix your KYC issue.
Share the screen access code for bank verification.

rules.name: KYC or Account Blocking Call
rules.explanation: Uses KYC expiry or account blocking threats to pressure the victim into sharing data or making payment.
examples: Your KYC expired and account will be blocked today.
Complete verification now to avoid wallet suspension.

rules.name: UPI Refund or Collect Request Call
rules.explanation: The caller tricks the victim into approving a UPI collect request or entering a PIN to supposedly receive money.
examples: Approve the UPI request to receive your refund.
Enter UPI PIN to claim cashback.

rules.name: Telecom SIM Blocking Threat
rules.explanation: Impersonates telecom staff or authorities and threatens SIM deactivation to obtain personal data or money.
examples: Your SIM will be blocked due to TRAI complaint.

rules.name: Police CBI or Customs Threat
rules.explanation: Uses law enforcement impersonation and criminal allegations to scare the victim into compliance.
examples: This is CBI. Your Aadhaar is linked to money laundering.
Customs found illegal parcel in your name.

rules.name: Card CVV or Net Banking Details
rules.explanation: The caller requests confidential card or net banking details.
examples: Confirm your card number, expiry and CVV.
Tell your net banking login to verify account.

rules.name: Urgent Time Pressure
rules.explanation: Uses pressure and continuous calling to prevent the victim from independently verifying the claim.
examples: Do not disconnect or your account will be frozen.
You have five minutes to complete verification.
